name: Humitech International Group Inc.
summary: Humitech International Group Inc. offers humidity control products in North America, Europe, and Asia. The company's products include Humitech Commercial Panel, which regulates humidity in refrigerated environment. It serves restaurants chains, hotels, hospitals, florists, and residential and commercial refrigeration markets. Humitech sells its products through franchise distributorship network, commercial dealers, Internet, direct sales organizations, and corporate national accounts. Humitech's clients include Arnie Morton's Steakhouse, Holiday Inn, L'Orangerie, Outback Steakhouse, Marriott, Hilton, and Preston Florist. It was founded in 2001 and is based in Addison, Texas.
